common.whatsappMessage: Hello, I'd like to ask about your physiotherapy services.

footer.tagline: Physiotherapy & Rehabilitation Center — Taif, Saudi Arabia

hero.headline: Recover with care, move with confidence
hero.lead: Shumos Care blends evidence-based physiotherapy with a calm, modern clinic experience — personalized treatment plans for every stage of recovery.

items.title: Certified Physiotherapists
items.description: Treatment plans led by licensed, experienced clinicians.

items.title: Personalized Care
items.description: Every program is built around your body and your goals.

items.title: Modern Equipment
items.description: A clinic equipped for thorough, comfortable rehabilitation.

items.title: Conveniently in Taif
items.description: Easy to reach, and easy to return to for ongoing care.

services.heading: Comprehensive physiotherapy, tailored to you
services.lead: From injury recovery to long-term pain management, every plan starts with understanding you.

items.title: Manual Therapy
items.description: Hands-on techniques to relieve pain and restore movement.

items.title: Sports Rehabilitation
items.description: Structured recovery programs to get athletes back to peak form.

items.title: Post-Surgical Recovery
items.description: Guided rehabilitation to support a safe, steady recovery.

items.title: Chronic Pain Management
items.description: Long-term strategies for lasting relief and better mobility.

items.title: Pediatric Physiotherapy
items.description: Gentle, specialized care for younger patients.

items.title: Home Visits
items.description: Rehabilitation support in the comfort of your own home.

testimonials.heading: Care that people notice

cta.heading: Ready to start your recovery?
cta.lead: Reach out on WhatsApp and our team will help you find the right treatment plan.
